category_sources: Official repository README documents jhead as a JPEG EXIF header utility.
source_facts.description says jhead extracts digital-camera setting info from EXIF JPEG headers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jhead; official repository uses the lowercase command/project name jhead.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository README documents command-line JPEG metadata operations.
source_facts.description identifies EXIF JPEG header extraction.
